title: ticket AI workflow & adaptive quick-edit
description:
## Summary
- Implements the AI-ready workflow for tickets with auto-detection logic in Postgres.
- Adds `attention_mode` (auto, ai_ready, needs_human) and computed `effective_attention_mode`.
- Introduces an adaptive `TicketQuickEdit` modal for faster triage and general editing.
- Updates the ticket list with attention badges, filters, and saved views (AI-Queue, Mensch nötig).

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all
- [x] task workspace:validate
- [x] manueller Check der UI-Komponenten (Svelte modal logic)

Co-Authored-By: Gemini-CLI
